name: langfuse
description: 🪢 Open source LLM engineering platform: LLM Observability, metrics, evals, prompt management, playground, datasets. Integrates with OpenTelemetry, Langchain, OpenAI SDK, LiteLLM, and more. 🍊YC W23
summaryZh: 🪢 Open source LLM engineering platform: LLM Observability, metrics, evals, prompt management, playground, datasets. Integrates with OpenTelemetry, Langchain, OpenAI SDK, LiteLLM, and more. 🍊YC W23  这是偏模型能力或模型封装的项目，适合作为能力底座持续观察。
whyItMatters: 最近仍在高频更新，仓库成熟度和社区基础都不错。
fitFor: 适合在持续跟踪 AI 开源趋势时作为重点观察对象。
